ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. MANA GEIFFITH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NAFISA EL-SHAFY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EL-SHAFY, NAFISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE) DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
